partial_progress.details: Research completed. Recommendation: Instantiate D-parametric infrastructure with D=TimelineQuot. The ParametricTruthLemma already provides truth lemma for any D; only need to build closure-saturated BFMCS. Estimated 6-8 hours. Zero sorries, zero new axioms.

completion_data.research_summary: Analyzed 4 resolution options. Recommended: Use D-parametric infrastructure (ParametricTruthLemma.lean, ParametricRepresentation.lean) with D=TimelineQuot. This reuses 500+ lines of proven code. Key gap: build temporally coherent BFMCS via closure saturation. The saturated_modal_backward theorem handles modal_backward without axioms.
key_findings: ParametricTruthLemma works for ANY D satisfying typeclasses
TimelineQuot has all required instances via DurationTransfer
saturated_modal_backward proves modal_backward from saturation WITHOUT axioms
Closure-based saturation suffices (subformula closure is finite)
TimelineQuot structure inherently has CanonicalR temporal coherence
